Bitmap data and definitions for display images including "dead face," empty bar, error URL, hex digits, and Pebble logo.


## Files
- **[dead_face.xbm](dead_face.xbm.md)**: Bitmap data for a 92x44 pixel "dead face" image used in the display driver.
- **[empty_bar.xbm](empty_bar.xbm.md)**: Defines a 96x8 pixel empty bar bitmap for display resources.
- **[error_url.xbm](error_url.xbm.md)**: Bitmap data for an error URL image with dimensions 109x14 pixels.
- **[hex_digits.h](hex_digits.h.md)**: Defines bitmaps for hexadecimal digits in XBM format for display purposes.
- **[pebble_logo.xbm](pebble_logo.xbm.md)**: Bitmap data for the Pebble logo with dimensions 105x27 pixels.
